name: svc-carpet
prompt: Professional carpet cleaning in action: a technician using a commercial truck-mounted carpet cleaning wand on beige residential carpet in a bright living room. Hot water extraction method, visible clean stripes on carpet. Realistic professional photo, warm natural lighting, 600x400 landscape format.

name: svc-upholstery
prompt: Professional upholstery cleaning: a technician carefully cleaning a light gray fabric sofa with a handheld upholstery cleaning tool. Modern living room setting, visible difference between cleaned and uncleaned sections. Realistic professional photo, soft natural lighting, 600x400 landscape format.

name: svc-tile
prompt: Professional tile and grout cleaning: close-up of a technician using a rotary floor scrubber on white tile floor with dark grout lines. One section gleaming clean, the other still dirty showing dramatic before/after contrast. Realistic photo, bright overhead lighting, 600x400 landscape format.

name: svc-hardwood
prompt: Professional hardwood floor cleaning and refinishing: a technician buffing a beautiful medium-tone hardwood floor with a commercial floor buffer. Gleaming reflective finish on the wood. Elegant dining room setting. Realistic professional photo, warm lighting, 600x400 landscape format.

name: svc-rug
prompt: Professional area rug cleaning: a colorful Persian-style area rug being carefully cleaned by hand with specialized rug cleaning equipment in a professional facility. The rug colors are vibrant and rich. Realistic professional photo, clean workshop setting, 600x400 landscape format.

name: svc-stone
prompt: Professional natural stone floor cleaning: a technician polishing a marble or travertine floor with a diamond polishing pad. The stone has a beautiful glossy finish reflecting light. Upscale bathroom or foyer setting. Realistic professional photo, bright lighting, 600x400 landscape format.

name: svc-vehicle
prompt: Professional car interior detailing and cleaning: a detailer shampooing car seats and carpet inside an SUV with a handheld extraction tool. Clean, bright garage setting. The car interior looks halfway done showing clean vs dirty contrast. Realistic professional photo, 600x400 landscape format.

name: svc-water
prompt: Water damage restoration scene: professional restoration technicians with commercial dehumidifiers and air movers set up in a residential room after water damage. Some equipment has visible branding-free industrial look. Urgent professional response scene. Realistic photo, 600x400 landscape format.

name: blog-remove-stains
prompt: Close-up of someone treating a red wine stain on light beige carpet with a cleaning solution spray bottle and white cloth. Home setting, realistic lifestyle photo showing stain removal process. Bright natural lighting, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-how-often
prompt: A professional carpet cleaning technician working in a bright modern home, pushing a commercial carpet cleaning wand across a large open living room. Family home with kids toys visible in background. Realistic photo, warm lighting, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-steam-vs-dry
prompt: Split comparison image: left side shows steam/hot water extraction carpet cleaning with visible steam rising, right side shows dry compound carpet cleaning with powder on carpet. Clean visual comparison, professional setting. Realistic photo, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-pet-odor
prompt: A golden retriever lying on a clean beige carpet in a cozy living room. Nearby is a bottle of enzymatic pet odor cleaner. The scene looks fresh and clean. Lifestyle photo, warm natural lighting, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-tile-grout
prompt: Dramatic before-and-after of tile and grout cleaning: half the white tile floor is dingy with dark dirty grout, the other half is sparkling clean with bright white grout. Bird's eye view angle. Realistic professional photo, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-hidden-spots
prompt: A person pulling a couch away from the wall revealing dust, dirt, and debris hidden underneath. Surprised expression. Bright living room, realistic lifestyle photo showing the hidden mess. Natural lighting, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-yearly-schedule
prompt: Flat lay of a cleaning calendar planner on a white desk with cleaning supplies arranged neatly around it: spray bottles, microfiber cloths, gloves, and a small potted plant. Organized, aesthetic, bright overhead photo. 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-rental-vs-pro
prompt: Side-by-side comparison: left shows a consumer rental carpet cleaner (Rug Doctor style) in a living room, right shows a professional truck-mounted carpet cleaning setup with commercial hoses. Visual quality/power difference clear. Realistic photo, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-upholstery-air
prompt: Close-up of a dusty couch cushion with visible dust particles floating in a beam of sunlight streaming through a window. Conveys allergens and poor air quality from dirty upholstery. Moody atmospheric photo, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-daily-habits
prompt: A person vacuuming a clean modern living room with a nice upright vacuum cleaner. Tidy room, neutral color carpet, plants and natural light. Happy, effortless daily routine vibe. Lifestyle photo, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-pet-floors
prompt: A happy family with a dog in a bright living room with clean hardwood and carpet floors. The dog is sitting on a clean area rug. Clean, fresh, pet-friendly home environment. Warm lifestyle photo, 800x450 landscape.

name: blog-spring-clean
prompt: Bright spring scene: open windows with fresh air flowing into a living room, sheer curtains blowing gently. Clean carpet visible, spring flowers on windowsill. Fresh seasonal deep-clean feeling. Bright airy photo, 800x450 landscape.
